front: Nothing pleases me more than this.
back: Nada me gusta más que esto.

front: Nothing pleased me more than that.
back: Nada me gustó más que eso.

front: I don't know how many times I visited him.
back: No sé cuántas veces lo visité.

front: I don't know how many times they visited her.
back: No sé cuántas veces la visitaron.

front: How many times did you visit her?
I want you to wait for him.
I want you to wait for her.
Do you want ME to wait for you?
I don't want you to wait.
I don't want you to speak.
Do you want us to wait?
I don't want you to speak about what we spoke about.
back: No quiero que hables de lo que hablamos.

front: I don't want you to speak about what we were discussing.
back: No quiero que hables sobre lo que hablábamos.

front: I need you to prepare it. (formal)
I need you to prepare it. (formal, clarified)

back: Necesito que prepare lo que falta.

front: It's necessary that we eat soon.
I prefer that they don't stay here.
back: Prefiero que no se queden aquí.

front: I prefer that you give it to him.
I prefer that you give it to her.
back: Prefiero que se lo des a ella.

back: Prefiero que se lo des a él.
